channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw (22246 ⭐)
item.description:

📝 Repository: zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw

item.title: 🦀 anthropics/claudes-c-compiler (2476 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: anthropics

📝 Repository: anthropics/claudes-c-compiler

📄 Descrizione: Claude Opus 4.6 wrote a dependency-free C compiler in Rust, with backends targeting x86 (64- and 32-bit), ARM, and RISC-V, capable of compiling a booting Linux kernel.

⭐ Stelle: 2476

🍴 Forks: 183

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

item.title: 🦀 sheeki03/tirith (1942 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: sheeki03

📝 Repository: sheeki03/tirith

📄 Descrizione: Your browser catches homograph attacks. Your terminal doesn't. Tirith guards the gate and intercepts suspicious URLs, ANSI injection, and pipe-to-shell attacks before they execute.

⭐ Stelle: 1942

🍴 Forks: 68

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: cli devtools homograph-attack rust security shell supply-chain-security terminal unicode url-security

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-02T04:33:47Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-03T03:05:27Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 always-further/nono (662 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: always-further

📝 Repository: always-further/nono

📄 Descrizione: Secure, kernel-enforced sandbox CLI and SDKs for AI agents. Capability-based isolation with secure key management, atomic rollback, cryptographic immutable audit chain of provenance. Run your agents in a zero-trust environment.

⭐ Stelle: 662

🍴 Forks: 50

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agent agentic-ai ai-agent-security ai-agents ai-security code-execution cybersecurity isolation linux-security llm mcp open-source prompt-injection runtime-security sandbox security sigstore supply-chain-security zero-trust

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

item.title: 🦀 Ataraxy-Labs/weave (462 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Ataraxy-Labs

📝 Repository: Ataraxy-Labs/weave

📄 Descrizione: Entity-level semantic merge driver for Git. Resolves conflicts that git can't by understanding code structure via tree-sitter. 31/31 clean merges vs git's 15/31.

⭐ Stelle: 462

🍴 Forks: 13

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents conflict-resolution developer-tools git mcp merge merge-driver rust semantic-merge tree-sitter

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-05T03:37:31Z

item.title: 🦀 matthart1983/netwatch (351 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: matthart1983
